# AlfaTechLabs

> AlfaTechLabs is a United Arab Emirates-based software studio that builds custom software, intelligent automation, and secure agentic AI systems for SMEs, enterprises, and government bodies across the UAE. The studio specialises in turning operational complexity into measurable, audit-grade systems — from real-time business cockpits to retrieval-augmented AI that runs entirely behind the customer's perimeter.

## What we build

- **Custom business software** — operational platforms, internal tools, and admin systems engineered for UAE retail, F&B, services, and multi-branch SMEs.
- **Agentic RAG and secure AI** — on-premises, audit-grade retrieval-augmented generation with role-based access control, citation-required answers, and tamper-evident logging. Designed for UAE government and enterprise contexts where data must never leave the perimeter.
- **Mobile applications** — cross-platform Flutter apps shipped to App Store and Play Store: customer-facing, admin/operations, and field-ops, including offline-first behaviour and automatic sync.
- **Workflow and approval automation** — configurable routing graphs, escalation policies, and tamper-evident audit ledgers that replace manual multi-step approval processes.
- **Long-term partnership** — observability, maintenance, and roadmap support after launch, not just delivery.

## Who we serve

- **SMEs** in UAE retail, F&B, services, and operations who need a single calm cockpit for sales, stock, staff, and reporting.
- **Enterprises** modernising internal knowledge, procurement, and field operations.
- **Government bodies** requiring AI systems that meet local data-residency, security, and audit requirements.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://alfatechlabs.net/): Overview of AlfaTechLabs services, capabilities, and case studies.
- [About](https://alfatechlabs.net/about.html): Company mission, founding principles, sectors served, and team capacity.
- [Portfolio](https://alfatechlabs.net/portfolio.html): Selected shipped projects with deliverables, services offered, and the four-phase delivery process.
- [Contact](https://alfatechlabs.net/contact.html): Project enquiry form. Replies within one business day.

## Solutions

- [Business Tracking Software](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/business-tracking.html): Real-time sales, POS, inventory, cost-control, and reporting in a single cockpit. Built for UAE retail, F&B, and SME operations.
- [Agentic RAG AI Systems](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/agentic-rag.html): Secure, audit-grade retrieval-augmented generation with agentic workflows. On-prem deployment, RBAC, customisable. Built for UAE government and enterprise.
- [On-demand Car Wash Platform (Case Study)](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/car-wash-app.html): A two-app Flutter ecosystem live in the UAE — customer booking app, operations admin app, real-time backend. Shipped to App Store and Play Store.
- [Corporate Knowledge Hub (Case Study)](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/corporate-knowledge-hub.html): An internal-only knowledge agent for an enterprise. Every answer cited, every access logged, nothing leaves the perimeter. Built on the Agentic RAG platform.
- [Field-Ops Mobile App (Case Study)](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/field-ops-app.html): A cross-platform Flutter field-ops app — offline-first, photo capture, auto-sync, auto-report. Built once, shipped on iOS and Android.
- [Procurement Approval Engine (Case Study)](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/procurement-approval-engine.html): A configurable approval-routing engine for an enterprise procurement team. Replaces a 9-step manual process with a rules-based routing graph and tamper-evident audit ledger.
- [SME Operations Platform (Case Study)](https://alfatechlabs.net/solutions/sme-operations.html): A lightweight ops cockpit for a fast-growing UAE retailer — sales, stock, staff, all in one screen, ready in six weeks. Built on the Business Tracking platform.

## Contact

- **Email:** hello@alfatechlabs.net
- **Region:** United Arab Emirates (serving Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and the wider UAE)
- **Hours:** Sunday – Thursday, 09:00 – 18:00 GST
- **Response time:** typically within one business day
